target.description: The target to investigate — an IP address (e.g. '8.8.8.8'), hostname (e.g. 'google.com'), or network/subnet (e.g. '10.0.0.0/24').

dimensions.description: Limit investigation to specific dimensions. Omit to check all: connectivity, interfaces, routing, firewall, nat, arp_dhcp, dns, resources, logs, vpn

symptom.description: Free-text symptom description (e.g. 'client cannot reach internet', 'VPN tunnel keeps dropping', 'slow throughput').
